{"action":"delegate_task","action_input":{"context_summary":"Building a general Chef skill framework. Generating proficiency levels for Kitchen Operations category.","inherit_context":true,"role":"proficiency_writer","task":"You are an expert HR competency framework writer. Generate 3 proficiency levels (Foundational, Proficient, Expert) for each of the following chef skills in the 'Kitchen Operations' category. For each skill, return proficiency levels using the add_proficiency_levels tool.\n\nSkills:\n1. Mise en Place & Station Management — Ability to prepare, organize, and maintain a fully stocked and efficient workstation ahead of and during service.\n2. Inventory & Waste Management — Ability to monitor stock levels, minimize food waste, and manage ingredient usage to control kitchen costs.\n\nProficiency levels to use:\n- Level 1: Foundational\n- Level 2: Proficient\n- Level 3: Expert\n\nEach level_description should be 1-2 sentences in enterprise HR language describing observable behaviors at that level. Use the add_proficiency_levels tool to save your results."}}
